issues.message: Computed background-color value "oklab(0.999994 0.0000455678 0.0000200868 / 0.9)" on <thead> (“Booking IDCustomerVenueDateTime SlotStat”) does not map to a known design token.
issues.suggestion: If this is intentional, ignore the warning. Otherwise, use a Marigold variant or a theme-rui token instead of a hard-coded value.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(5) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > table:nth-child(3) > thead:nth-child(1)

issues.message: <Drawer> has no accessible name. A closed overlay is invisible to runtime a11y checks, so it must be labeled in the source.
issues.suggestion: Add a <Drawer.Title> child or an aria-label prop, e.g. <Drawer aria-label="…"> or <Drawer.Title>…</Drawer.Title>.

issues.message: <Inline> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Inline>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: <Stack> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Stack>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: <Stack> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Stack>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: <Stack> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Stack>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: <Table> has no column marked rowHeader. Exactly one Table.Column should set rowHeader so screen readers can announce each row by it.
issues.suggestion: Add rowHeader to the column that identifies each row, e.g. <Table.Column rowHeader>Name</Table.Column>.

issues.message: <Table> has no column marked rowHeader. Exactly one Table.Column should set rowHeader so screen readers can announce each row by it.

issues.suggestion: Consider using <Columns collapseAt="..."> for responsive multi-column layout, or <Stack> for vertical arrangement.

issues.message: Content overflows viewport at reflow (320px) (320px): scroll width 549px exceeds viewport by 229px. Widest element: <table> (“This week's bookings table”) extends to 549px.
issues.suggestion: Tabular content needs a 2D layout and is exempt from reflow, but it should not widen the whole page. Wrap the table in <Scrollable> so it scrolls horizontally on its own.

issues.message: Content overflows viewport at mobile (375px): scroll width 549px exceeds viewport by 174px. Widest element: <table> (“This week's bookings table”) extends to 549px.
issues.suggestion: Tabular content needs a 2D layout and is exempt from reflow, but it should not widen the whole page. Wrap the table in <Scrollable> so it scrolls horizontally on its own.

details.culpritSelector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(5) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > table:nth-child(3)

issues.message: Touch target too small at mobile (375px): select elements are 104x21px (minimum 24x24px per WCAG 2.5.8).
issues.suggestion: Increase the clickable area. Marigold interactive components have built-in minimum sizes — check if custom styling reduces the target.

issues.message: Document should have one main landmark (landmark-one-main)
issues.suggestion: Wrap your page content in `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` to provide a `<main>` landmark. Import AppLayout from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Page should contain a level-one heading (page-has-heading-one)
issues.suggestion: Add a `<Headline level={1}>` component for the page title — it renders an `<h1>`. Import Headline from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: All page content should be contained by landmarks — 7 elements affected (region)
issues.suggestion: All page content must be inside a landmark region. Use `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` for the main area, `<TopNavigation>` for the header (`<header>`), and `<Sidebar>` for side navigation (`<aside>`). Import from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Interactive element <button> (button) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.

issues.suggestion: Marigold components provide built-in focus rings via the theme. For custom elements, add an outline or box-shadow on :focus-visible.
